title: Synthetic city water notice summary
claim_summary: A synthetic public notice says a city water maintenance window is expected to affect a small service area for one evening.
evidence_notes: The synthetic notice names the affected service area and expected maintenance window.
The synthetic notice gives a public contact channel for residents seeking updated information.
limitations: Example data only; not connected to a real city or notice.
The card does not verify whether the maintenance occurred.
The source locator is treated as text and is not fetched.
rights_notes: Synthetic example created for documentation and tests.
No permission or reuse conclusion is implied for real public notices.
